title: Front Office Manager - Hilton India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Hilton India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hilton India! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hilton India:
Hilton India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hilton India!
